name: Measure Galaxy Morphological Asymmetry
description: AstroImageJ is launched. The raw FUV galaxy image is located at ~/AstroImages/raw/uit_galaxy_sample.fits. Your goal is to compute the morphological asymmetry of this galaxy. Generate an absolute difference residual image (32-bit float) by subtracting a version of the image rotated 180 degrees around its center from the original. Save this residual image to ~/AstroImages/morphology/asymmetry_residual.fits. Measure the Mean, Standard Deviation, Minimum, and Maximum of the residual image and record these values with clear labels in a text file at ~/AstroImages/morphology/asymmetry_stats.txt.
